text:
is the second collection of short stories for the Attack on Titan manga, written by Hajime Isayama. The booklet was bundled with the special edition of volume 21.

The English edition was exclusively included in the season 3 part 2 manga box set released by Kodansha USA in June 2019.

The stories were originally published on the "au Smart Pass" and "Sugotoku" apps.

Plot

IN THE NIGHT

As night falls, many stories come to light in the world within the Walls. Listen in on Jean and the recruits as they talk and laugh about their days... or join Krista as she spins a story of make believe in the girls' barracks! From drunken hijinks with Moblit, to Hannes and the Garrison soldiers' chatty night watch, this short story collection captures intimate moments of the 104th and their fellow soldiers.

Summary

The booklet contains two stories: and .
